code: import apiClient from"./apiClient";export const authService={register:async function(userData){let type=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:"user";const endpoint="/auth/".concat(type,"/register");const response=await apiClient.post(endpoint,userData);if(response.data.token){localStorage.setItem("token",response.data.token);localStorage.setItem("user",JSON.stringify(response.data.user));}return response.data;},login:async function(credentials){let type=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:"user";const endpoint="/auth/".concat(type,"/login");const response=await apiClient.post(endpoint,credentials);if(response.data.token){localStorage.setItem("token",response.data.token);localStorage.setItem("user",JSON.stringify(response.data.user));}return response.data;},logout:()=>{localStorage.removeItem("token");localStorage.removeItem("user");},getCurrentUser:()=>{const user=localStorage.getItem("user");return user?JSON.parse(user):null;},isAuthenticated:()=>{return!!localStorage.getItem("token");}};export const loadService={createLoad:async loadData=>{const response=await apiClient.post("/load",loadData);return response.data;},getLoads:async function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};const response=await apiClient.get("/load",{params});return response.data;},getLoadById:async id=>{const response=await apiClient.get("/load/".concat(id));return response.data;},updateLoad:async(id,loadData)=>{const response=await apiClient.put("/load/".concat(id),loadData);return response.data;},deleteLoad:async id=>{const response=await apiClient.delete("/load/".concat(id));return response.data;}};export const locationService={getLocationSuggestions:async query=>{const response=await apiClient.get("/location/suggestions",{params:{query}});return response.data;}};
